overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a cowboy character walking through a muddy, gas-lit historic town at night during light rain. The character traverses from a dense commercial district past horse-drawn carriages to the outskirts and back through residential areas with balconies.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with gas lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy street toward the large white mansion with green shutters

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with wrap-around balcony and lit windows
large white building with green shutters and multiple balconies dominating the street view
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow muddy street lined with historic buildings featuring wooden balconies. Warm gas lamps illuminate the foggy night as the character approaches a prominent white mansion with green shutters.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional street with utility poles and wooden storefronts

events.description: passing the white mansion into a street with wooden western buildings and visible utility poles
horse-drawn carriage appears on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing through the town past wooden buildings and utility poles

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving slowly on the right side of the muddy street

entered.detail: single-story wooden frontier-style building with porch
tall wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires
wooden horse-drawn carriage with large wheels parked on the street

segments.scene_description: Having passed the white mansion, the character enters a wider street lined with wooden western-style buildings and tall utility poles. A horse-drawn carriage becomes visible on the right as the character continues through the muddy thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: town outskirts with grass fields and sparse buildings

events.description: exiting the dense town into open outskirts with grass fields visible on the sides
rain becomes visibly heavier as the character reaches the edge of town

agents.ego_description: walking toward the outskirts where buildings thin out and grass fields appear

entered.detail: open grassy area beyond the town buildings
simple wooden post fence lining the property boundary
large wooden industrial building with double doors

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dense built-up area and enters the town outskirts where grass fields and wooden fences replace the continuous buildings. The rain becomes more noticeable as the environment opens up to reveal the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with two-story houses featuring balconies

events.description: turning back into a residential area with two-story houses and people visible on balconies
horse rider passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the residential district passing houses with lit windows and people on porches

notable_agents.action: people standing on the balcony of a two-story house watching the street
rider on horseback passing by on the right side of the street

entered.detail: wooden two-story house with external staircase and lit windows
wooden balcony attached to the second floor with people standing on it
rustic wooden building with porch and hanging signs

segments.scene_description: The character returns to a more populated residential area with two-story houses featuring balconies where people stand watching the street. A horse rider passes by as the character continues through the muddy streets lit by warm gas lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked historic town that transitions from a dense commercial district to the open outskirts before returning to a residential neighborhood. It begins on a narrow muddy street where warm gas lamps pierce the fog, guiding the character past wooden balconies toward a prominent white mansion with green shutters. As the character passes the mansion, the environment expands into a wider thoroughfare lined with western-style buildings and tall utility poles, where a horse-drawn carriage appears on the right. The scene then opens further into the town outskirts, replacing the buildings with grassy fields and wooden fences under a darkening night sky as the rain intensifies. Finally, the camera follows the character back into a populated residential area, passing two-story houses with watching residents and a lone horse rider under the glow of flickering gas lamps.
